metadata.description: A collection of reusable Claude Code skills by debuginn

plugins.name: debuginn-wx-xhs-poster
plugins.description: Turn a screenshot into a square promotional image for WeChat or Xiaohongshu, using an interactive web tool.

plugins.name: debuginn-skill-tool
plugins.description: Guided builder for hugo-theme-skills tool pages — generates .md front matter, Hugo controls partial, canvas JS, and dual-theme CSS for a new skill.

plugins.name: debuginn-note
plugins.description: Organize and summarize a conversation into a structured Markdown document and save it locally.
